title: DPRK / Overland from Panmunjon to Pyongyang
description:
Overland on the Panmunjon - Pyongyang highway, DPRK.This highway is the direct access road to South Korea. 
Like other highways we have passed, this one looked like an airstrip or tank corridor too.
I got the permission from my two guides to shoot through the window. Though the road was in poor condition and the car windows dirty I was elated to get that chance. No cars were in sight. Sometimes people walking on the highway.

As it always happened day after day, the two guides discussed every move of us over lunch and talked daily to the main travel office in Pyongyang to get instruction. After arrival in Pyongyang that evening, they must have discussed the filming with their superior because next day all shooting from the car window was forbidden...
